g.text: 🧠 Second Brain on Oracle AI Database 26ai
your sources → one database → agents + an MCP server — self-improving, private, reachable from any AI chat
1 · 📥 YOUR SOURCES — you choose, swap freely
normalize → posts · redact secrets · classify private vs content · embed in-DB (no external API)
relational + JSON Duality + AI Vector Search — one engine, no glue
vectors + keyword, fused (RRF) — wiki · post · passage
only visibility='content' is EVER read — everywhere
agent #1 of many — they share the brain
5 · 🔌 MCP server — plug the brain into ANY AI chat
read: search · fetch · wiki · topics · recent · by_series · overview · write: ingest_note (gated)
local (stdio) + hosted (OAuth allowlist · fail-closed · rate-limited) — switch chat apps, the brain stays
